introSection: Boomerang is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Prater in Vienna, Vienna, Austria. It is best known for being the first of two Vekoma Boomerang installations to not use shoulder straps.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This is a Boomerang installation from Vekoma.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Yellow track with a red spine and supports. The coaster used to feature blue track and yellow supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Boomerang first opened in 1992 with Vekoma's trains. In 2007, the park replaced the original trains with new trains featuring tiered seating, no sides, and only lap bar restraints.

fullText:
Boomerang is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Prater in Vienna, Vienna, Austria. It is best known for being the first of two Vekoma Boomerang installations to not use shoulder straps.

This is a Boomerang installation from Vekoma.

Yellow track with a red spine and supports. The coaster used to feature blue track and yellow supports.

Boomerang first opened in 1992 with Vekoma's trains. In 2007, the park replaced the original trains with new trains featuring tiered seating, no sides, and only lap bar restraints.
